_description: Top-2 Hessian eigenvalues for the seed used in figures/landscape_hessplane.png. Backs the trajectory cited in Section 4 of the paper (lambda_1 = 221.5 -> 218.2 -> 144.6 across collapse epoch +/- 20). These values are the source-of-truth labels rendered on the corresponding figure.
notes: Values transcribed from the rendered figure axis labels (figures/landscape_hessplane.png).
The original generation script was not checked in; this JSON exists so the cited trajectory is independently inspectable from results/.
The companion 10-seed Hutchinson sweep in results/hessian_gpu.json and results/hessian_cpu.json uses a different seed grid and stride and does not include this seed-0 / epoch-244 evaluation.
